sectionHeadings: FR-01: npm audit covers every npm surface
FR-02: workflow-pins job is co-owned by spec 015
record.summary: One workflow, two gates: npm audit over every npm surface (root workspace and the standalone apps/api) with a high-severity failure bar, and the workflow-pins lint (spec 015) over .github/**. Runs on every PR and on a weekly Monday cron so new advisories surface on quiet weeks.
record.title: Supply-chain gates: npm audit and workflow-pin enforcement
